evals.prompt: Create a README.md file in /tmp/test-auto-format-1/ for a small Node.js library called "date-utils". Include a title, description, installation instructions, a usage example with a code block, and a license section.
evals.expected_output: A README.md file is created and format-md is run on it
expectations: The agent created a README.md file in /tmp/test-auto-format-1/
The agent ran $JUST_CMD format-md (or ajust/sjust format-md) on the created file
The agent did NOT run npx prettier directly
The agent detected the platform (uname) to choose sjust or ajust

evals.prompt: Edit the file /tmp/test-auto-format-2/CHANGELOG.md to add a new entry under today's date for a feature called "dark mode toggle". The file already exists with some content.
evals.expected_output: The CHANGELOG.md is edited and format-md is run on it afterward
expectations: The agent edited /tmp/test-auto-format-2/CHANGELOG.md with a dark mode toggle entry
The agent ran $JUST_CMD format-md (or ajust/sjust format-md) AFTER editing the file
The agent did NOT attempt to manually format the Markdown content
The agent detected the platform (uname) to choose sjust or ajust

evals.prompt: Create two files in /tmp/test-auto-format-3/: a CONTRIBUTING.md with guidelines for pull requests and code style, and an API.md documenting three REST endpoints (GET /users, POST /users, DELETE /users/:id). Include request/response examples.
evals.expected_output: Both .md files are created and format-md is run on both
expectations: The agent ran $JUST_CMD format-md on both files (either in one call or two separate calls)
The agent did NOT run npx prettier directly

evals.prompt: I just finished building a microservices app in /tmp/test-auto-format-4/ with three services: auth, billing, and notifications. Can you document the high-level architecture? Include how the services communicate and what tech stack each one uses.
evals.expected_output: A Markdown documentation file is created and format-md is run on it, even though the user never explicitly asked for Markdown
expectations: The agent created a .md file (any name) in /tmp/test-auto-format-4/
The agent ran $JUST_CMD format-md (or ajust/sjust format-md) on the created file
The agent detected the platform (uname) to choose sjust or ajust
The agent did NOT attempt to manually reformat the Markdown content
